name: QD - Quad Drum Voice
description: Four-voice digital drum module with sample, wavetable and modeled synthesis per voice, CV/LFO assignment, internal stereo mixing, EQ/compression, and preset storage.

controls.name: 3-way toggle
controls.description: Switches the encoder page between mute/voice assignment, mixer/EQ and CV/LFO assignment.
controls.detail: top: mute/voice · middle: mixer · bottom: CV/LFO

controls.name: Encoder
controls.description: Main edit encoder for model selection, parameter assignment, CV/LFO depth, preset navigation and hidden functions.

controls.name: F-button
controls.description: Opens the shortcut page for presets and other special functions.

controls.name: Voice buttons 1-4
controls.description: Selects, mutes and manually retriggers the four voices depending on the active page.

controls.name: Voice 1-4 pitch
controls.description: Sets pitch for modeled drums, samples or wavetables; CV can scale to V/oct at maximum depth.

controls.name: Voice 1-4 decay
controls.description: Sets envelope decay or gate length, depending on the selected sound engine.

controls.name: Voice 1-4 model/sample/wavetable parameter
controls.description: Sets the engine-specific third parameter, such as sample select, wavetable select or the selected drum model's extra control.

inputs.name: TRIG 1-4
inputs.description: Trigger inputs for the four voices.

inputs.name: CV 1-4
inputs.description: Assignable CV inputs for voice parameters, pan, volume and preset control.

outputs.name: OUT L
outputs.description: Main left output from the internal stereo mixer and EQ/compressor.

outputs.name: OUT R
outputs.description: Main right output from the internal stereo mixer and EQ/compressor.

behaviors.name: Three engines per voice
behaviors.trigger: select a model, sample set or wavetable bank
behaviors.description: Each voice can act as a modeled drum, a sample player or a wavetable VCO. The same front-panel controls adapt to the selected engine.

behaviors.name: CV and LFO assignment
behaviors.description: Each CV input or LFO can be assigned to pitch, decay, sample selection, pan or volume, with depth adjusted in 32 steps.

behaviors.name: Gate mode hold
behaviors.description: Samples, wavetables and some models hold while the gate is high and only enter decay after the trigger falls.

behaviors.name: Choke groups
behaviors.trigger: enable choke routing in the voice assignment page
behaviors.description: One voice can be set to choke another, which is useful for closed-hat style muting and tighter drum articulation.

behaviors.name: Random folders and step triggers
behaviors.trigger: uppercase RANDOM folder or CV step trigger setting
behaviors.description: Folders marked RANDOM choose a new sample on every trigger, and each voice can treat its nearby CV input as a step trigger for sample stepping.

behaviors.name: Internal mix and master dynamics
behaviors.description: The module mixes four voices to two outputs, with per-voice volume and pan, master volume, three-band EQ and compressor.

behaviors.name: Preset and memory-card workflow
behaviors.description: The module stores 64 presets, supports copy/delete and can save or load presets to the memory card in firmware 1.12.3+.

behaviors.name: Hidden reverb
behaviors.description: A hidden reverb page is available and only feeds the main outputs 1 and 2.

patchIdeas.name: Four-part drum rack
patchIdeas.patch: Voice 1 = kick model · Voice 2 = snare model · Voice 3 = hat model · Voice 4 = percussion model · sequencer clocks each voice separately · stereo mix stays internal until the final output stage.
patchIdeas.diagram:
QD:
* Voice 1: kick model
* Voice 2: snare model
* Voice 3: hat model
* Voice 4: percussion model

Sequencer:
Output:

- Sequencer (Trig 1) t> QD (TRIG 1)
- Sequencer (Trig 2) t> QD (TRIG 2)
- Sequencer (Trig 3) t> QD (TRIG 3)
- Sequencer (Trig 4) t> QD (TRIG 4)
- QD (OUT L) -> Output (L)
- QD (OUT R) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Random sample percussion
patchIdeas.patch: Voice 1 in sample mode · RANDOM folder enabled · CV 1 scans sample select · short gates retrigger a changing hit pattern with low-latency repeats and controlled randomness.
patchIdeas.diagram:
QD:
* Voice 1: sample mode
* Voice 1 folder: RANDOM
* CV 1: sample select

Sequencer:
LFO:
Output:

- Sequencer (Gate) g> QD (TRIG 1)
- LFO (Out) >> QD (CV 1)
- QD (OUT L) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Wavetable thump
patchIdeas.patch: Voice 2 in wavetable mode · pitch CV quantized to semitones · decay short · wavetable select animated slowly for pitched percussive motion that sits between drum and tone.
patchIdeas.diagram:
QD:
* Voice 2: wavetable mode
* Voice 2 pitch: V/oct scaled
* Voice 2 decay: short

Sequencer:
Output:

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> QD (CV 2)
- Sequencer (Trig) t> QD (TRIG 2)
- QD (OUT L) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Choked fill layer
patchIdeas.patch: Voice 3 and voice 4 share a choke relationship · rapid fill pattern on voice 4 interrupts voice 3 · use this for abrupt fills without needing external voice-stealing logic.
patchIdeas.diagram:
QD:
* Voice 3: hat model
* Voice 4: accent model

Sequencer:
Mixer:
Output:

- Sequencer (Trig 3) t> QD (TRIG 3)
- Sequencer (Trig 4) t> QD (TRIG 4)
- QD (OUT L) -> Mixer (In 1)
- QD (OUT R) -> Mixer (In 2)
- Mixer (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Preset morph performance
patchIdeas.patch: CV 4 selects presets · store contrasting drum kits in adjacent slots · sweep CV 4 with a slow LFO or stepped CV for live kit changes without reprogramming triggers.
patchIdeas.diagram:
QD:
* CV 4: preset select
* Presets: multiple kits

LFO:
Output:

- LFO (Out) >> QD (CV 4)
- QD (OUT L) -> Output (L)
- QD (OUT R) -> Output (R)
